feedItems.description: allocated £143.8m to Children's Social Care (≈£248 per resident)
allocated £252.6m to Adult Social Care (≈£437 per resident)
allocated £45.2m to Roads & Transport (≈£78 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £116 (5.1%) to £2402
